title: Infosys Receives INR 40,72,525 Penalty Demand Related to GST Turnover Declaration Mismatch
detailed_summary: Infosys received communication from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes for collection of a penalty totaling INR 40,72,525. The demand relates to an alleged under declaration of turnover due to a mismatch in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 versus GSTR-9 for F.Y. 2018-19. Infosys stated there is no material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication for collection of a total penalty of INR 40,72,525/- from the Deputy Commissioner of Commercial Taxes.
The demand was issued for alleged under declaration of turnover due to a mismatch in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 vs GSTR-9 for the F.Y. 2018-19.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Penalty demand issued for alleged under declaration of turnover due to mismatch in credit notes declared in GSTR-1 vs GSTR-9 for the F.Y. 2018-19.

important_text_spans.reason: Supports the amount of the penalty demand.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports Infosys's stated assessment of business and financial impact.
